claims: The skill reads and displays AWS console credentials (username, password) from environment variables in clear text. While the skill's educational purpose requires AWS access for hands-on Kinesis examples, explicitly displaying sensitive credentials (especially passwords) is unnecessary and insecure. The skill should instead rely on existing AWS CLI/SDK authentication (via environment variables or IAM roles) without exposing credentials. Additionally, the skill performs file system operations (reading/writing progress files) which could be excessive if not properly sandboxed, though this is more aligned with its educational tracking function.
